name: Fucked and Bred by Tentacles
description:
You’re fucked by tentacles, now you’re pregnant. Whoops! Even the boys aren't safe for this one, yall are pregnant too.

If you enjoy, please consider liking or leaving a review. If you hate this, consider telling me why! I’m always trying to improve :)

Warning for possible dead dove, depending on how you rp. It could be consensual but it's very easy to make not.
